generated_oml:
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures hoist swinging motion"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures wind speed"
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance SwingAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Swing angle sensor data transmitted via MQTT protocol"
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance WindSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Wind speed sensor data transmitted via MQTT protocol"
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Anemometer
]

instance SwingAngleTimeSeriesData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series swing angle measurements stored in TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]

instance WindSpeedTimeSeriesData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series wind speed measurements stored in TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:fromData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]

instance CartMovementStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Stepper motor for cart movement along gantry crane track"
]

instance HoistingMovementStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Stepper motor for hoisting movement of the crane"
]

instance TMC4671EvalMotorControllerCart : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "TMC4671-Eval motor controller for cart movement stepper motor"
]

instance TMC4671EvalMotorControllerHoist : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "TMC4671-Eval motor controller for hoisting movement stepper motor"
]

instance Electromagnet : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electromagnet at end of hoist for picking up containers"
]

instance Fusion360CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD model of gantry crane created in Autodesk Fusion360"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DockerContainerization
]

instance KinematicTrajectoryModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kinematic model used for trajectory optimization of gantry crane movements"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonGantrylib
]

instance TimescaleDB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Time-series database for storing and processing sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:enables DatabaseService
]

instance Grafana : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Visualization and dashboarding tool for monitoring crane operations"
    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardService
]

instance EclipseMosquittoMQTTBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker for sensor data transmission between physical components and digital twin services"
    DTDFVocab:enables MQTTBrokerService
]

instance PythonGantrylib : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python module gantrylib for controlling gantry crane components"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGeneratorService, SimulationService
]

instance DockerContainerization : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Docker containerization for deploying digital twin services"
    DTDFVocab:enables DatabaseService, DashboardService, TrajectoryGeneratorService, SimulationService, ContinuousValidationService, MQTTBrokerService
]

instance ArduinoHardware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Arduino hardware for controlling sensors and actuators"
    DTDFVocab:enables MQTTBrokerService
]

instance SystemDesignService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for system design using Arcadia/Capella models"
    DTDFVocab:provides SystemDesignInsight
]

instance SystemDesignInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "System design insights from Model-Based Systems Engineering"
]

instance DTEvolutionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for tracking digital twin evolution using DarTwin notation"
    DTDFVocab:provides DTEvolutionInsight
]

instance DTEvolutionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights into digital twin evolution for teaching applications"
]

instance DatabaseService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Historical data logging and storage in TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataAccess
]

instance HistoricalDataAccess : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Access to historical sensor data for analysis"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DashboardService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization and alerting via Grafana dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:provides ThresholdBreachedNotification
]

instance ThresholdBreachedNotification : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Notification triggered when validation thresholds are breached for crane operation"
]

instance TrajectoryGeneratorService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimal trajectory generation using kinematic model for crane movements"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalTrajectoryInsight
]

instance OptimalTrajectoryInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimal path for crane movement to move pucks between locations"
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation of crane dynamics using CAD models and kinematic model"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationInsight
]

instance SimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulated crane behavior for validation and training"
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for continuous validation comparing real-time measurements with simulations"
    DTDFVocab:provides ContinuousValidationInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights from continuous validation of real-time measurements against simulations"
]

instance MQTTBrokerService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "MQTT broker service for handling communication between physical components and digital twin services"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataTransmission
]

instance DataTransmission : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic transmission of sensor data via MQTT protocol"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance GantryCraneSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Lab-scale gantry crane system inspired by Antwerp harbor cranes, moving pucks as containers"
    base:contains SwingAngleEncoder, Anemometer, CartMovementStepperMotor, HoistingMovementStepperMotor, TMC4671EvalMotorControllerCart, TMC4671EvalMotorControllerHoist, Electromagnet
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Optimal movement trajectories generated by Trajectory Generator Service transmitted to Physical Crane Interface for motor control via the Control Application, enabling precise crane movement execution."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous real-time synchronization for validation and logging, with data streamed as events occur; no specific time intervals specified but continuous monitoring for operational tasks."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Physical crane with controller connected to digital twin components via MQTT broker; digital side includes containerized services (Database, Dashboard, Trajectory Generator, Simulation, Continuous Validation) and Python-based control applications, all deployed on a single personal computer."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Primarily covers the 'as operated' phase, supporting operational monitoring, validation, and fault detection during crane operation; no mention of design or manufacturing phases."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Continuous validation service compares real-time measurements against simulations using distance metrics; breaches of threshold trigger operator notifications for validity checks."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT broker facilitates inter-service communication within the digital twin; physical component communication protocols are not explicitly detailed in the document."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Docker containerized Database, MQTT Broker, and Dashboard; gantrylib Python module installed via pip on a single personal computer."
]
